productName: Stars & Rosin - Kiwi Sherbert x Purple Push Pop Rosin - .5g
description: This infused hybrid pre-roll wraps Kiwi flower around a concentrate boost (think kief, hash, distillate, or diamonds) for a louder aroma and a longer session. Built for a stronger, longer session and more intense effects — a tangy kiwi flavor, with a smooth, well-rounded vibe. A little goes a long way.
